messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for tirzepatide (Zepbound) for member NH-655138 for weight loss, BMI 34 without diabetes. Attached: prescriber order and gym membership receipts. Weight-loss drugs are listed as an exclusion in the member's plan.
